prompt: I'm curious about the doordash article https://merchants.doordash.com/en-us/blog/profit-margins-restaurant-businesses which mentions a restaurant type with a 6-9% profit margin and bulk order capability. gtfa_claims: Fast food restaurants have 6-9% profit margin
Fast food can place bulk orders
12 records of fast food in the CSV
